# misp_feed (Resource)

A MISP feed. Feeds allow MISP to pull threat intelligence from external sources on a schedule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_feed" "example" {
  name          = "Abuse.ch URLhaus"
  provider_name = "abuse.ch"
  url           = "https://urlhaus-api.abuse.ch/v1/misp/"
  source_format = "misp"
  enabled       = true
  distribution  = "3"
  input_source  = "network"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Feed name.
- `provider_name` (String) Human-readable name of the feed's upstream provider (e.g. `abuse.ch`). Named `provider_name` because `provider` is a reserved word in Terraform — the underlying MISP field is still `provider`.
- `url` (String) URL of the feed source.

### Optional

- `caching_enabled` (Boolean) Enable local caching of feed data.
- `delta_merge` (Boolean) When true, attributes removed from the feed are also removed from MISP.
- `distribution` (String) Distribution level (`0`=org only, `1`=community, `2`=connected, `3`=all).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the feed is active and will be fetched on schedule.
- `fixed_event` (Boolean) When true, all feed data is merged into a single fixed event instead of creating new events.
- `force_to_ids` (Boolean) Force all imported attributes to be marked as IDS signatures.
- `input_source` (String) Source type: `network` (fetched over HTTP/S) or `local` (local file path).
- `lookup_visible` (Boolean) Make the feed visible in the lookup interface.
- `orgc_id` (String) Creator organisation id to attribute to imported events.
- `override_ids` (Boolean) Override the IDS flag on imported attributes.
- `publish` (Boolean) Publish events imported from this feed immediately.
- `rules` (String) JSON-encoded filtering rules applied when importing from the feed.
- `sharing_group_id` (String) Sharing group id (used when distribution is `4`).
- `source_format` (String) Feed format. Common values: `misp`, `freetext`, `csv`. Defaults to `misp`.
- `tag_id` (String) Tag id to apply to events pulled from this feed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP feed by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_feed.example 5
```
